zh.Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States: 美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Walford於大約1624年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Walford27歲，母親Jane Guy27歲。她於1644年與Rev Thomas Peavey Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1686年7月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆劍橋大學默里 卡素劍橋大學默里 卡素 易曼德享年63歲。

zh-hans.Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States: 美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Walford于大约1624年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Walford27岁，母亲Jane Guy27岁。她于1644年与Rev Thomas Peavey Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1686年7月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆劍橋大學默里 卡素劍橋大學默里 卡素 易曼德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places so named, such as Walford (Herefordshire), Walford in Leintwardine (also Herefordshire), Walford in Baschurch (Shropshire), and possibly Walford Hall in Hampton in Arden (Warwickshire), though this last may be a manorial placename deriving from the surname. The Herefordshire placenames probably derive from Old English walh ‘foreigner, Welshman’ (genitive plural wala) + ford ‘ford’. The Shropshire placename derives from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + ford. If it does not derive from the surname, the Warwickshire placename probably has the same etymology as the Herefordshire placenames.
perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Walford in Wimborne Minster (Dorset). The placename probably derives from Old English walt ‘unsteady’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Walford was born about 1624, in Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Walford, was 27 and her mother, Jane Guy, was 27. She married Rev Thomas Peavey Sr in 1644, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in July 1686, in New Castle Island, New Castle, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Walford est née environ 1624, à Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Walford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jane Guy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Rev Thomas Peavey Sr en 1644, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1686, à New Castle Island, New Castle, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Walford è nata il circa 1624 nel Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Walford, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Jane Guy, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Rev Thomas Peavey Sr nel 1644, nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1686, nel New Castle Island, New Castle, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Walfordが約1624年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Walfordは27歳，母Jane Guyは27歳であった。1644年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムグレエンランドでRev Thomas Peavey Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1686年7月にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムニュー カストルニュー カストル イスランドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Walford(이)가 대략 1624년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Walford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Guy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1644년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드에서 Rev Thomas Peavey Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1686년 7월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴 카스틀 뉴 카스틀 이슬랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Walford родилась около 1624 г. в местности роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Walford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Guy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev Thomas Peavey Sr в 1644 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла июль 1686 г. в местности ню кастл исланд, ню кастл, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Walford nació aproximadamente 1624, en Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Walford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jane Guy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Rev Thomas Peavey Sr en 1644, en Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1686, en New Castle Island, New Castle, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
